description: Execute V0.7-M5-B by defining the legacy tooling deprecation roadmap, including explicit criteria for deprecation, retention, and removal.
scope: Generate a roadmap document (tasks/v0.7-m5-b-legacy-tooling-roadmap.md) that explicitly maps out the fate of all Python scripts in the scripts/ directory. The document must define the deprecate/retain/remove criteria and ensure workflow state semantic continuity.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO actual deletion of Python scripts. NO modifications to existing shell bootstrap scripts. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.
stop_conditions: Attempting to physically delete any legacy Python scripts.
Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M5-B contract.
